summary: Compiler, guard, runtime validator, and verifier are generation-aware. Compiler can create gen-000/runtime.control.json from run.control.json; guard/validator validate current_generation; verifier scopes completion to current_generation and rejects unresolved amendments.
proof: Updated verify_runtime_progress.py to filter by current_generation and gate unresolved amendments.
Added tests/skills/test_reviewed_replanning_control.py compiler, guard, validator, and verifier cases.
